channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Agentic Query Workload
item.description: Agentic Query Workload Definition The agentic query workload is the distinct shape of demand that autonomous agents place on retrieval systems — qualitatively different from the human search workload that current infrastructure was tuned for.

item.title: Purpose-Built Agentic Search Models
item.description: Purpose-Built Agentic Search Models Definition Purpose-built agentic search models are LLMs trained specifically on the search task — the rewrite / retrieve / rerank loop — rather than general-purpose models (GPT-5, Sonnet, Gemini) that happen to be able to call a search tool.

item.title: Bonsai
item.description: Bonsai Bonsai (bonsai.io) is a managed OpenSearch / Elasticsearch hosting provider.

item.title: SID.ai
item.description: SID.ai SID.ai builds purpose-built agentic LLMs for search and reranking — smaller, specialized models trained specifically on the rewrite / retrieve / rerank loop rather than general-purpose tool use.

item.title: Trey Grainger
item.description: Trey Grainger Background Trey Grainger is the author of “AI-Powered Search” (Manning Publications) and a leading practitioner in search and knowledge graph integration.

item.title: index
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: LinkedIn
item.description: LinkedIn Professional social network (>1 billion members).

item.title: Shaped
item.description: Shaped Recommendation and ranking platform (shaped.ai). Exposes ranking models like LambdaMART through a policy-config system (e.g.

item.title: Agentic Search
item.description: Agentic Search Definition Agentic search refers to search systems that go beyond simple retrieval to plan, decompose, execute, verify, and refine — functioning more like engineering teams pursuing goals under uncertainty than simple lookup functions.
